title: EA trade
author: Comprehensive_Elk960
selftext: Any of you thinking for start trade with EA ?

replies.author: YOLO401Kto0
replies.body: lol come back here when you have a live account with over 6 month minimum forward test records

comments.author: Boring-Owl9885
comments.body: Yes. I am coding one bot like that

comments.author: Careless-Diamond-277
comments.body: The question is always how many years you tested

replies.author: Comprehensive_Elk960
replies.body: Only one month …but lot size wasn’t limited .

replies.author: Careless-Diamond-277
replies.body: Then fix it and to again can be brutal without fix Lot or % based scaling

comments.author: robert_lewis_12
comments.body: It takes a while to fully get into it, but I've shifted completely to EAs and it has made my life so much easier. Just be sure to backtest it thorougly before you use it in the live markets. Also, dont buy an EA, they are usually scams, rather take your own strategy and either code it yourself or get an agency or freelancer to code it for you.

replies.author: Comprehensive_Elk960
replies.body: Well said bro , also I am going to sell it

comments.author: smartedge-77
comments.body: I have been using SmartEdge for the past 6 months and its constantly profitable, like 10-15%.a month
